channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Despite its trailer, Capcom says its Resident Evil - Code: Veronica remake is third-person and taking its cue from Resident Evil 2 - Eurogamer
item.description:
1. Despite its trailer, Capcom says its Resident Evil - Code: Veronica remake is third-person and taking its cue from Resident Evil 2  Eurogamer
  2. Resident Evil: Veronica Will Only Be Third-Person, Steve Might Be Better This Time  Restart.run
  3. Resident Evil Veronica's first-person trailer was a deliberate misdirect, Capcom producer confirms the horror game is fully third-person  GamesRadar+
  4. Capcom's new Resident Evil remake may be just as big and bold as RE4  Polygon.com
  5. Yes, Resident Evil: Veronica Is A Third-Person Game  GameSpot

item.title: 1666 Amsterdam hoped for a glorious welcome, but faces backlash for ‘oversight’ - Notebookcheck
item.description:
1. 1666 Amsterdam hoped for a glorious welcome, but faces backlash for ‘oversight’  Notebookcheck
  2. 1666: Amsterdam developers respond to genAI controversy  Gamereactor UK
  3. 1666: Amsterdam Developer Gets Caught, Fesses Up To Using AI Assets  Kotaku
  4. “You Play as a Cat!”: After a 15-Year Development Battle, Patrice Désilets Details the Trippy Era-Hopping Gameplay of 1666: Amsterdam  IGN
  5. Wonky witch fable 1666: Amsterdam is the kind of sexy nonsense I want from Assassin's Creed: Hexe  Rock Paper Shotgun

item.title: First Ascentionist Pushes Back on Heavy Retrobolting of Snake Dike - Gripped Climbing Magazine
item.description:
1. First Ascentionist Pushes Back on Heavy Retrobolting of Snake Dike  Gripped Climbing Magazine
  2. A Wild Bolt War Is Brewing on Yosemite’s Half Dome. We Spoke to the One Climber Who Can Stop It.  Climbing Magazine
  3. Yosemite’s Famous Snake Dike is Getting More Bolts  Gripped Climbing Magazine
  4. Start of Snake Dike  Gripped Climbing Magazine

item.title: Alien: Isolation 2 is Poised to Deliver Another Bold Chapter in Survival Horror - XBOX Wire
item.description:
1. Alien: Isolation 2 is Poised to Deliver Another Bold Chapter in Survival Horror  XBOX Wire
  2. Alien: Isolation 2 keeps the classic horror game's uncompromising approach to raising tension  Engadget
  3. Survival Horror’s Greatest Stalker Is Back for More in Alien: Isolation 2, and We’ve Played It  IGN
  4. Sega's new sci-fi horror sequel is one of the best Summer Game Fest demos  Polygon.com
  5. Alien Isolation 2: How the Survival Horror Genre Has Evolved in the 12 Years Since the First One  IMDb

item.title: How Street Fighter 6 Landed Tifa And Why She’s Not The Start Of A Flood Of New Guest Characters - Kotaku
item.description:
1. How Street Fighter 6 Landed Tifa And Why She’s Not The Start Of A Flood Of New Guest Characters  Kotaku
  2. How Final Fantasy VII's Tifa Arrived In Street Fighter 6  Game Informer
  3. Capcom Explains How Tifa From Final Fantasy 7 Came to Be a Street Fighter 6 DLC Character  IGN
  4. Street Fighter 6 Year 4 DLC characters Yasmine, Arjun, Tifa, and Bosch announced  Gematsu
  5. Street Fighter 6 Has Been Trying to Get Tifa for 3 Years  Push Square

item.title: What Could Guild Wars 3 Be? Speculating On Last Weekend's Big MMO Announcement - MMORPG.com
item.description:
1. What Could Guild Wars 3 Be? Speculating On Last Weekend's Big MMO Announcement  MMORPG.com
  2. IGN Live: Enter to Win a Guild Wars 3™ branded Alienware Laptop!  IGN
  3. Guild Wars 3, Modern Evolution of the MMORPG, Announced at Summer Game Fest for PC and PlayStation 5  PR Newswire
  4. Guild Wars 3 will have no battle pass or subscription because ArenaNet studio lead doesn't want to "keep people hostage"  Eurogamer
  5. Guild Wars 3 Will Not Have Subscription or Battlepass  80 Level
